data.name: Fattening Career
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Fattening Career, a Visual Novel that centers around feeding, weight gain, and a touch of breast expansion. In this game, you’ll have the opportunity to become an A+ Feeder, a chocolatier, a lab researcher, and more.


Fattening Career offers 16 beautiful ladies with their own unique stories, personalities, and body types.
From shy bottom-heavy blonde study partner to extravagant pink-haired top-heavy popular streamer, there is someone for everyone.
With no restrictions to how many love interests you can pursue, you'll be able to build the ultimate harem.


Most sexual interactions are fully animated.
With high-quality jiggle physics, you'll be able to witness the extra pounds shift around in real time.
All sex animations are planned to include female moans and general sex sounds.


With the unique weight gain stage system, your choices will directly impact the size of your companions.
Each woman's size is always represented visually throughout the game, with ever-changing interactions based on their weight.
You can buy many sweets and loads of junk food for your favorite girl to speed up their gain or choose to slow down the growth.

Fattening Career contains the following fetishes:
- Weight Gain/Feederism(Major focus)
- BBW/SSBBW(Major focus)
- Breast Expansion(Major focus)
- Harem
- Lactation
- Pregnancy(Planned)


This game is a passion project by a solo artist/developer and few writers. I love to hear what you think about the game.
Feel free to share your opinions, ideas and criticisms about the game - I listen to your feedback.

data.short_description: Welcome to Fattening Career, a Visual Novel that centers around feeding, weight gain, and a touch of breast expansion. In this game, you’ll have the opportunity to become an A+ Feeder, a chocolatier, a lab researcher, and more.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel or AMD CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64bit
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Quad core Intel or AMD CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Quad core Intel CPU or M1 SoC
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel or AMD CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Quad core Intel or AMD CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel or AMD CPU
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 64bit
  • Processor: 2.0Ghz Quad core Intel or AMD CPU
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
